steps.title: Identify the contrast between the sentences
steps.content: Sentence 1 says kyudo was not a medal sport. Sentence 2 says it was featured, but as a demonstration sport — a qualification that corrects the initial impression.

steps.title: Find the transition that marks this contrast
steps.content: Rather marks exactly this kind of contrast — it means “on the contrary” and signals when a second statement qualifies or corrects a first one. The other three choices don't work: thus suggests consequence, additionally suggests adding more information in the same direction, and for example introduces an example. That matches choice B — B is correct.
